title: /kernel
summary_text: Kernel orchestration is active for this session. Bootstrap target: 6+ lanes (minimum 6). Lane manifest: - `execution-primary`: execution - scoped implementation, code edits, local verification - `verification-review`: review - correctness, regression, CI, release-readiness checks - `risk-monitor`: risk - security, governance, policy-gate, failure-mode checks - `test-validation`: validation - test execution, reproduction, regression coverage - `context-gathering-fallback`: context - scope intake, minimal discovery, on-demand doc loading - `monitoring-ops-fallback`: monitoring - health checks, state tracking, incident/recovery coordination Next input can be the actual task, or `/kernel FOCUS="..."` if you want to pin a workstream.
